decisions.decision: Used `ObservableObject` pattern (like `KanbanBoard`) for reactive UI updates
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Capped action log at 50 entries to bound memory
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Rick & Morty themed naming ("Architect Morty", "Backend Morty", etc.)
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Role-specific colors: architect=purple, backend=blue, frontend=orange, explorer=cyan
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Renamed `AgentStatus` (ClaudeToolEvent) to `AgentActivityStatus` to avoid enum conflict
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Renamed placeholder `KanbanCard` view to `PlaceholderKanbanCard` for clarity
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Used `@StateObject` for manager to ensure single source of truth
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Connected parser automatically on session change for seamless switching
decisions.author: frontend-morty
